modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Email sent from wrong account in Outlook, unable to use department email.

full_description_text: I sent an email yesterday, but it seems that recipients received it from the wrong account. I am trying to send emails from our department email address, but I am not given the option to send new mail from this second account. This issue is causing confusion among the recipients and is affecting our communication.
short_description: Email sent from wrong account in Outlook, unable to use department email.
description: I sent an email yesterday, but it seems that recipients received it from the wrong account. This issue is causing confusion among the recipients and is affecting our communication.
